hooks.name: session-start-discipline-reminder
hooks.description: Display the Rushee pipeline banner and warn if no context map exists

hooks.name: guard-no-code-before-feature-card
hooks.description: Warn if writing production Java code without a Feature Card

hooks.name: guard-domain-purity
hooks.description: BLOCK @Entity, @Service, Spring/JPA annotations in domain layer

hooks.name: guard-no-hardcoded-secrets
hooks.description: BLOCK hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens in any source file

hooks.name: guard-openapi-contract-sync
hooks.description: Remind to regenerate both API clients after any OpenAPI spec change

hooks.name: remind-migration-on-entity-change
hooks.description: Remind to create Flyway migration when JPA entity changes

hooks.name: auto-run-tests-after-edit
hooks.description: Remind to run the test suite after editing a test file
